title: Analytical Mechanics Homework on Hamiltonian Dynamics
desc: Explores canonical variables, momentum-space Lagrangians, and double pendulum dynamics in analytical mechanics.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs of canonical transformations using generating functions for various coordinate systems.

title: Analytical Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Proofs of canonical transformations and Poisson bracket calculations in analytical mechanics.

title: Canonical Transformations in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Analyzing canonical transformations to eliminate anharmonic terms and solving for action-angle variables in a periodic potential.

title: Lagrangian Mechanics Homework Solutions
desc: Solutions for three physics problems using Lagrangian equations, covering spring-mass systems, inclined planes, and conical constraints.

title: Variational Calculus Homework Solutions
desc: Applying Euler-Lagrange equations to solve shortest paths on spheres, minimal surfaces of revolution, and hanging chain shapes.

title: Atmospheric Refraction via Variational Calculus
desc: Deriving sunlight trajectory through Earth's atmosphere using functional minimization and the Euler-Lagrange equation.

title: Central Force Problems in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Solving for central forces in Archimedean spiral and inverse-cube law trajectories using conservation laws.

title: Scattering Cross Sections in Analytical Mechanics
desc: Calculates scattering cross sections for particles in a spherical potential well and for Rutherford scattering between two electrons.

title: Perturbation Analysis of Pendulum Motion
desc: Using perturbation methods to derive second-order approximate solutions for a pendulum's motion and period corrections.
